inputs.label: File Size
inputs.businessContext: Size of the file to download, in gigabytes (GB).

businessContext_i18n.en: Size of the file to download, in gigabytes (GB).

inputs.label: Download Speed
inputs.businessContext: Nominal download speed of the internet connection, in megabits per second (Mbps).

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal download speed of the internet connection, in megabits per second (Mbps).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İnternet bağlantısının megabit/saniye (Mbps) cinsinden nominal indirme hızı.

inputs.label: Protocol Overhead
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of bandwidth lost due to network protocol overhead (e.g., TCP/IP).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of bandwidth lost due to network protocol overhead (e.g., TCP/IP).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ağ protokolü yükü (örn. TCP/IP) nedeniyle kaybedilen bant genişliği yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Parallel Connections
inputs.businessContext: Number of simultaneous download connections (assumes linear speed scaling).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of simultaneous download connections (assumes linear speed scaling).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eşzamanlı indirme bağlantılarının sayısı (doğrusal hız ölçeklemesi varsayar).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
